items.label: § Type
items.value: Young Serif for display, Commissioner for body, DM Mono for labels, Caveat for marginalia. Edit the imports in src/css/tokens.css to swap them.

items.label: § Palette
items.value: A warm paper and cocoa system stored as OKLCH. Tokens live in src/css/tokens.css; see /styles/ for the full specimen.

items.label: § Built with
items.value: Node.js standard library only — no framework, no bundler, no dependencies. The whole build is in build.js.

items.label: § Writing
items.value: Markdown with a small set of MDX components (Dropcap, Pullquote, MarginaliaPin, Footnote). Files in src/content/.

items.label: § Hosted on
items.value: GitHub Pages, deployed by .github/workflows/pages.yml on every push to main.
